revision.text:
'''天満天神宮'''（てんまんてんじんぐう）は[[日本]]の[[神社]]（[[天満宮]]）。[[宗教法人]]の社名としては11社存在する。
== 一覧 == * [[天満天神宮 (市川市)]] - 千葉県市川市大野町に鎮座する[[本光寺 (市川市)|本光寺]]の境内社。 * [[天満天神宮 (身延町)]] – 山梨県南巨摩郡身延町古関鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (島田市)]] – 静岡県島田市伊太鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)]] – 静岡県賀茂郡西伊豆町中鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (大洲市)]] – 愛媛県大洲市成能甲鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)]] – 高知県高知市尾立鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)]] – 高知県高知市福井町鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)]] – 高知県土佐市浅井鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)]] – 高知県土佐市用石鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)]] – 高知県吾川郡いの町枝川字池ノ谷鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)]] – 高知県吾川郡いの町枝川字藤ヶ瀬鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (日高村)]] – 高知県高岡郡日高村本村鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[天満宮]] * [[天神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[北野神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[北野天神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{Aimai}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:てんまんてんしんくう}} [[Category:天満宮|てんまんてんしんくう*]] [[Category:同名の神社]]

{{Aimai}}

* [[天満天神宮 (市川市)]] - 千葉県市川市大野町の大野城跡に鎮座する神社で、[[本光寺 (市川市)|本光寺]]の境外社。宗教法人ではない。 * [[天満天神宮 (身延町)]] – 山梨県南巨摩郡身延町古関鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (島田市)]] – 静岡県島田市伊太鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)]] – 静岡県賀茂郡西伊豆町中鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (大洲市)]] – 愛媛県大洲市成能甲鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)]] – 高知県高知市尾立鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)]] – 高知県高知市福井町鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)]] – 高知県土佐市浅井鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)]] – 高知県土佐市用石鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)]] – 高知県吾川郡いの町枝川字池ノ谷鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)]] – 高知県吾川郡いの町枝川字藤ヶ瀬鎮座。 * [[天満天神宮 (日高村)]] – 高知県高岡郡日高村本村鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[天満宮]] * [[天神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[北野神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[北野天神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]

revision.text:
'''Tenman Tenjingu''' (天満天神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}} ({{ill|Tenmangu|ja|天満宮}}). There are 11 {{ill|Religious corporations|ja|宗教法人}} with this name.
* {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ichikawa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (市川市)}} - A shrine located at the site of the former Ōno Castle in Ōnocho, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture, and is an outer shrine of {{ill|Honkōji|ja|本光寺 (市川市)}}. It is not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Minobu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (身延町)}} – Located in Koseki, Minobu Town, Nanko District, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Shimada City)|ja|天満天神宮 (島田市)}} – Located in Itachi, Shimada City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Nishiizu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)}} – Located in Naka, Nishiizu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ōzu City)|ja|天満天神宮 (大洲市)}} – Located in Narunouko, Ōzu City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Odate, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)}} – Located in Odate, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Fukuicho, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)}} – Located in Fukuicho, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Asai, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)}} – Located in Asai, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Yōishi, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)}} – Located in Yōishi, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Ikedani)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)}} – Located in Ikeno, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Fujigase)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)}} – Located in Fujigase, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Hidaka Village)|ja|天満天神宮 (日高村)}} – Located in Motomura, Hidaka Village, Takaoka District, Kochi Prefecture.
== Related Items == * {{ill|Tenmangū|ja|天満宮}} * {{ill|Tenjin Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|天神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|北野神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Kitano Tenjin Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|北野天神社 (曖昧さ回避)}}
{{Aimai}}

'''Tenman Tenjingu''' (天満天神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}} ({{ill|Tenmangu|ja|天満宮}}). There are 11 {{ill|Religious corporations|ja|宗教法人}} with this name.
* {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ichikawa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (市川市)}} - A shrine located at the site of the former Ōno Castle in Ōnocho, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture, and is an outer shrine of {{ill|Honkōji|ja|本光寺 (市川市)}}. It is not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Minobu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (身延町)}} – Located in Koseki, Minobu Town, Nanko District, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Shimada City)|ja|天満天神宮 (島田市)}} – Located in Itachi, Shimada City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Nishiizu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)}} – Located in Naka, Nishiizu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ōzu City)|ja|天満天神宮 (大洲市)}} – Located in Narunouko, Ōzu City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Odate, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)}} – Located in Odate, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Fukuicho, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)}} – Located in Fukuicho, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Asai, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)}} – Located in Asai, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Yōishi, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)}} – Located in Yōishi, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Ikedani)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)}} – Located in Ikeno, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Fujigase)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)}} – Located in Fujigase, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Hidaka Village)|ja|天満天神宮 (日高村)}} – Located in Motomura, Hidaka Village, Takaoka District, Kochi Prefecture.

'''Tenman Tenjingu''' (天満天神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Japan|ja|日本|12=draft}} ({{ill|Tenmangu|ja|天満宮|12=draft}}). There are 11 {{ill|Religious corporations|ja|宗教法人|12=draft}} with this name.
* {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ichikawa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (市川市)|12=draft}} - A shrine located at the site of the former Ōno Castle in Ōnocho, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture, and is an outer shrine of {{ill|Honkōji|ja|本光寺 (市川市)|12=draft}}. It is not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Minobu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (身延町)|12=draft}} – Located in Koseki, Minobu Town, Nanko District, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Shimada City)|ja|天満天神宮 (島田市)|12=draft}} – Located in Itachi, Shimada City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Nishiizu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)|12=draft}} – Located in Naka, Nishiizu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ōzu City)|ja|天満天神宮 (大洲市)|12=draft}} – Located in Narunouko, Ōzu City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Odate, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)|12=draft}} – Located in Odate, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Fukuicho, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)|12=draft}} – Located in Fukuicho, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Asai, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)|12=draft}} – Located in Asai, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Yōishi, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)|12=draft}} – Located in Yōishi, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Ikedani)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)|12=draft}} – Located in Ikeno, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Fujigase)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)|12=draft}} – Located in Fujigase, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Hidaka Village)|ja|天満天神宮 (日高村)|12=draft}} – Located in Motomura, Hidaka Village, Takaoka District, Kochi Prefecture.

It is not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Minobu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (身延町)|12=draft}} – Located in Koseki, Minobu Town, Nanko District, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Shimada City)|ja|天満天神宮 (島田市)|12=draft}} – Located in Itachi, Shimada City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Nishiizu Town)|ja|天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)|12=draft}} – Located in Naka, Nishiizu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Ōzu City)|ja|天満天神宮 (大洲市)|12=draft}} – Located in Narunouko, Ōzu City, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Odate, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)|12=draft}} – Located in Odate, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Fukuicho, Kochi City)|ja|天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)|12=draft}} – Located in Fukuicho, Kochi City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Asai, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)|12=draft}} – Located in Asai, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Yōishi, Tosa City)|ja|天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)|12=draft}} – Located in Yōishi, Tosa City, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Ikedani)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)|12=draft}} – Located in Ikeno, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Inocho, Edagawa Fujigase)|ja|天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)|12=draft}} – Located in Fujigase, Edagawa, Inocho, Kochi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenman Tenjingu (Hidaka Village)|ja|天満天神宮 (日高村)|12=draft}} – Located in Motomura, Hidaka Village, Takaoka District, Kochi Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''天満天神宮'''（てんまんてんじんぐう）は、日本の[[神社]]（[[天満宮]]）。[[宗教法人]]の社名としては11社存在する。
== 主な天満天神宮 == * [[天満天神宮 (市川市)]] - [[千葉県]][[市川市]][[大野町 (市川市)|大野町]]（[[大野城 (下総国)|大野城]]跡に鎮座。[[本光寺 (市川市)|本光寺]]の境外社。宗教法人ではない。） * [[天満天神宮 (身延町)]] - [[山梨県]][[南巨摩郡]][[身延町]]古関 * [[天満天神宮 (島田市)]] - [[静岡県]][[島田市]]伊太 * [[天満天神宮 (西伊豆町)]] - 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]]中 * [[天満天神宮 (大洲市)]] - [[愛媛県]][[大洲市]]成能甲 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市尾立)]] - [[高知県]][[高知市]]尾立 * [[天満天神宮 (高知市福井町)]] - 高知県高知市福井町 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市浅井)]] - 高知県[[土佐市]]浅井 * [[天満天神宮 (土佐市用石)]] - 高知県土佐市用石 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川池ノ谷)]] - 高知県[[吾川郡]][[いの町]]枝川字池ノ谷 * [[天満天神宮 (いの町枝川藤ヶ瀬)]] - 高知県吾川郡いの町枝川字藤ヶ瀬 * [[天満天神宮 (日高村)]] - 高知県[[高岡郡]][[日高村]]本村
== 関連項目 == * [[天満宮]] * [[天神社]] * [[北野天神社]] * [[北野神社 (曖昧さ回避)|北野神社]]
{{Aimai}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:てんまんてんしんくう}} [[Category:天満宮|てんまんてんしんくう*]] [[Category:同名の神社]]
